penalties.description: The circle was not fully cut out. Both models confirmed the task ended with incomplete cutting progress.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed the circle was not completed, triggering the incomplete_circle penalty. The task ended early with minimal cutting progress visible. Since the circle was not freed from the gauze, this results in a zero score per the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks.

disagreements.rationale: Both times were very close and within reasonable measurement variance for such a short task duration.
Incomplete circle penalty results in automatic zero score, so penalty_deductions equals the full time_score to zero out the final score.

disagreements.resolution: Used GPT's more conservative phase list
disagreements.rationale: With only 14% completion reported by Claude, circle_following phase was not sufficiently established to include.
